title: so is 30 officially going to be you can not redo and qu
display_title: so is 30 officially going to be you can not redo and qu
wikitext:
[]: so is 3.0 officially going to be "you can (not) redo&qu             Quote Post by duexmachina » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:03 am or is this something we're just saying.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:13 am "Evangelion: Q" is the title, "you can [not] redo" is the international title. Bit odd that you seem to think its something people just made up.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:14 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Restriktion » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:51 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: That's a redo&qu-lous question.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:47 pm I don't like the international title. Why couldn't they just keep the Japanese title for it?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Fri Jul 27, 2012 7:50 pm I guess because the 'Jo-ha-kyū' thing wouldn't resonate with non-Japanese.

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Fri Jul 27, 2012 11:55 pm oh I'm sorry, i guess i messed up the tittle while i was editing a careless mistake. anyhow, i thought it was just going to be just Q . I had no idea that "you can (not) redo" was the official tittle. i thought it was something we were all having fun with. my bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Pomme » Mon Jul 30, 2012 12:09 pm Btw have you an idea how Japanese can interpret this Q ? Is this mean something in they language ? International title are good and well think for Evangelion !

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 30, 2012 12:43 pm Pomme wrote: Btw have you an idea how Japanese can interpret this Q ?
